title: A Rainy Walk in the Park
synopsis: A grey day in the park becomes fun when a child decides to enjoy the rain instead of hiding from it.
sentences: Clouds covered the sky all morning, and Leo thought the day would be boring.
His mother asked if he still wanted to walk to the park.
When the first drops fell, Leo almost said no.
But he put on his yellow raincoat and boots anyway.
The park looked different in the rain.
The paths were shiny, the grass looked brighter, and the trees smelled fresh.
Leo jumped over puddles and listened to the soft tapping on his hood.
He saw ducks making circles in the pond and a dog shaking water from its fur.
At first his hands felt cold, but soon he forgot about the weather.
By the time they walked home, Leo was smiling under his hood.
He said the park had felt like a new place.
Rain, he decided, was not always a bad thing.
